name: ptouch-cradle
description: Two-part desktop cradle + label-catch tray for Brother PT-P750W. Checks tray sliding fit into cradle tray slot, and printer clearance in printer pocket.

parts.name: cradle
parts.description: Cradle body — printer pocket at back (Y=0..160), tray slot at front shelf (Y=160..254.9). Origin at cradle exterior front-left-bottom corner.

parts.name: tray
parts.description: Label-catch tray — slides into cradle tray slot from the front. Local origin at tray exterior front-left-bottom. Assembly position: tray X min=3.40 (slot_x0 + 0.35mm clearance per side), tray Y min=160.0 (slot back wall), tray Z min=4.0 (slot floor).

parts.name: printer
parts.description: Brother PT-P750W reference box: 78x152x143mm. Positioned at X=15..93, Y=3..155, Z=4..147 inside the printer pocket (pocket interior: X=14..94, Y=3..157, Z=4+).

interference.description: Tray body must not intersect cradle slot walls or floor — pure clearance fit, zero interference allowed
Printer box must not intersect cradle printer pocket walls or floor — clearance fit, zero interference allowed

fitSpecs.name: tray-slot-clearance-x
fitSpecs.description: Sliding fit clearance between tray exterior side walls and cradle slot side walls (0.35mm per side spec)

fitSpecs.name: printer-pocket-clearance
fitSpecs.description: Clearance fit between printer box and cradle printer pocket walls (1.0mm per side spec)
